description: Style Note Stylish top from mineral, perfect for the modern fashionista. A smart recombination of natural fabrics with a western construct, it's a must-have this season. Product Details Party pink colour sleeveless tunic, has a square, cutwork with net detailing on the yoke, tucks on the front, elasticated on the back yoke, flared hem with lace detailing Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
